Process.title: The Creative Blueprint
Process.desc: How we collaborate to transform your concept into production-ready output.

step1.title: 1. Discovery
step1.desc: Aligning project goals, reference styles, budget options, and technical constraints.

step2.title: 2. Visual Draft
step2.desc: Creating initial design drafts, styleboards, and UI outlines for feedback.

step3.title: 3. Crafting
step3.desc: Execution of coding, photo/video capturing, or branding asset generation.

step4.title: 4. Handover
step4.desc: Final system deployments, high-res file delivery, and launch support.
